direct_runtime_candidate_lifecycle.materialize: generate one absolute-index FP32 chunk and write every intersecting packed BF16 runtime span directly
direct_runtime_candidate_lifecycle.post_generation: one exact BF16 readback validates streamed per-chunk digests and rebinds the V71 runtime registry
direct_runtime_candidate_lifecycle.pre_generation: coverage plus V71 object/storage/version checks; a fail-closed content sentinel is rebound so an early exact audit rejects; reward remains provisional; no D2H
direct_runtime_candidate_lifecycle.restore: stream immutable FP32 master into all runtime spans, exact-audit master and BF16 runtime once, otherwise terminal poison
direct_runtime_candidate_lifecycle.unknown_or_partial_rpc: exact full restore or terminal poison

promotion_blockers: CUDA absolute-index generator is not implemented or attested
direct GPU runtime-view writer is not integrated into the V71 worker
direct H2D/D2H and HBM traffic counters are absent
paired throughput and phase-time improvement is unmeasured
purpose: Fuse absolute-index IID/rank-k structured perturbation generation with bounded direct writes into the production 82-view BF16 LoRA layout and stream weighted updates into a rollback-owned FP32 master.

registered_cpu_acceptance.packed_projection: exact A duplication and B split/scale

must_report: H2D, D2H, HBM, scratch, and peak VRAM bytes
per-GPU useful work and cleanup idle
exact candidate/restore and <=2 ULP update certificates
paired reward, semantic, and OOD noninferiority

sealed_counter_schedule.global_source_traversal: source keys ascending then local absolute index

streamed_update_lifecycle.commit: provisional until exact V71 commit boundary
streamed_update_lifecycle.final: rollback retained until exact V71 final boundary
streamed_update_lifecycle.output: one full FP32 pending master owned by the transaction; this is persistent rollback/commit output, not scratch
streamed_update_lifecycle.reduction: fixed seed-ascending FP32 accumulation into bounded chunks
streamed_update_lifecycle.unknown_or_partial_rpc: discard pending output and exact-audit original, or terminal poison
